results.title: Cristiano Ronaldo Leaves Social Media Influencer In Tears With Touching Words During Special Meeting Ahead Of FIFA World Cup 2026 Match | Video
results.description: Ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, Cristiano Ronaldo met Belgian influencer Celine Dept at Portugal’s training base. Emotional after finally meeting her idol, Celine was comforted by Ronaldo’s warm and humble response. The touching interaction went viral, earning praise from fans and showcasing Ronaldo’s kindness and genuine connection with supporters.

results.title: ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’ to Hit Indian Theatres a Day Before Global Release
results.description: Indian fans get early treat as Spider-Man: Brand New Day arrives in theatres on July 30, ahead of global release.

results.title: Cristiano Ronaldo sends heartwarming message for fans ahead of Portugal’s 2026 FIFA World Cup opener
results.description: Cristiano Ronaldo has won domestic leagues in England, Spain, and Italy, a Champions League five times, and the European Championship with Portugal. The one trophy that has eluded him across two decades of professional football is the only one that would put the GOAT debate to rest. At 41, in what is almost certainly his final World Cup, he arrived in the United States dressed in a navy-grey team jacket and fashionable glasses, telling reporters to take it one match at a time.

results.title: Telangana seeks addl urea allocation from Centre ahead of kharif
results.description: Hyderabad: The Telangana government has urged the Centre to bridge a significant shortfall in urea supplies and ensure adequate fertiliser availability ahead of the peak agricultural season. Agriculture Minister Tummala Nageswara Rao has written to Union Minister for Chemicals and Fertilisers Jagat Prakash Nadda, seeking immediate intervention to address the deficit in urea allocations during ... results.description: IND vs AFG 2026 1st ODI: Shubman Gill's side will have to ring in plenty of changes for the first ODI vs Afghanistan in Dharamshala on Saturday with Virat Kohli and Hardik Pandya ruled out of the series due to injuries.

results.title: Amazon India’s two-wheeler store clocks 2x YoY growth, tier 2-3 cities lead
results.description: New Delhi [India], June 12 (ANI): Amazon India’s two-wheeler store on Amazon.in has recorded 2x year-on-year growth, largely driven by Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities, as consumers increasingly choose premium and electric bikes alongside commuter models, according to a statement by Amazon.in. Aman Lohan, Director – Home, Kitchen and Outdoors, Amazon India, said, “The two-wheeler buying journey in India is often long and can get overwhelming with multiple options, fuel types and price points to consider.

results.title: The Cold Blob in the Atlantic Just Got a Cause. The Ocean Current That Warms Europe Is Slowing Down.
results.description: A new study by Stefan Rahmstorf and colleagues, published this week in Geophysical Research Letters, concludes that the Atlantic 'cold blob' south of Greenland is being caused by a weakening Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation rather than by surface heat loss. The current that delivers heat to Europe is slowing down, and it is doing it deep enough in the water column to mean what the climate models said it would.
